 TOTAL_ANC 
 Total costs for ancillary services 

 ALL_EANDM_INGRP 
 Total costs for E and M services billed by EPs in given practice 

 ALL_EANDM_OTHGRP 
 Total costs for E and M services billed by EPs outside practice 

 TOTAL_ER 
 Total costs for emergency services not included in a hospital admission 

 PHYS_DURHOSP_INGRP 
 Total costs for EP services during hospitalization in practice 

 PHYS_DURHOSP_OTHGRP 
 Total costs for EP services during hospitalization outside practice
